name: Brain Cube
description: Notes Unlike tiered skulls, the Brain Cube does not have a Vampire Blast ability. In exchange, the minion it summons rapidly deals 4 hits of heavy defense-ignoring damage in an expanding area of effect with a generous 10% lifesteal. As the lifesteal is applied to each instance of damage, the Brain Cube can rapidly heal players if multiple enemies are caught in the blast radius.

stats.damage: Burst 1: 340 (+10 for every DEX above 42) Burst 2: 425-510 (+10 for every DEX above 42) Burst 3: 340-425 (+10 for every DEX above 42) Burst 4: 255-340 (+10 for every DEX above 42)
stats.range: Burst 1: 2.25 tiles Burst 2: 3.25 tiles Burst 3: 4.25 tiles Burst 4: 5.25 tiles

effects: Necromancy: raise 1 Brain Undead to fight for you.On Use: Produces 4 explosions at the aim point.Subsequent bursts deal decreasing damage over a wider area.
Shots hit multiple targets Ignores defense of target Shots pass through obstacles
